ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: Wikipedia Helper 设置 > 阅读 文档！

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
The Wikipedia Helper plugin integrates with the Web viewer core plugin to enable you to open articles directly inside of Obsidian! You just need to enable it. It does the heavy lifting of loading the website itself in Obsidian. In this case the Wikipedia Helper plugin just provides the search functionality. Using the Web viewer plugin is completely optional but I highly recommend you check it out! Without it enabled all articles will be opened in your default browser. Note: This will only be shown to you once. ~ Murphy :)

tl;dr: Enable the Web viewer plugin (Settings > Core plugins > Web viewer) to open Wiki articles directly inside of Obsidian!
ast.target:
Wikipedia Helper 插件与 Web viewer 核心插件集成，使你可以直接在 Obsidian 内打开文章！你只需启用它。它负责在 Obsidian 中加载网站本身的繁重工作。在这种情况下，Wikipedia Helper 插件仅提供搜索功能。使用 Web viewer 插件完全可选，但我强烈建议你看看！如果未启用，所有文章都会在默认浏览器中打开。注意：这只会向你显示一次。~ Murphy :)

tl;dr: 启用 Web viewer 插件（Settings > Core plugins > Web viewer）即可在 Obsidian 内直接打开 Wiki 文章！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of search results to show. (1≤limit≤500)
ast.target: 显示的最大搜索结果数。（1≤limit≤500）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default folder where notes should be created.
ast.target: 创建笔记的默认文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to automatically use the active notes title when searching for articles and nothing is selected.
ast.target: 在搜索文章且未选中内容时，是否自动使用当前笔记标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to automatically select the response to a query when there is only one article to choose from.
ast.target: 当只有一篇文章可选时，是否自动选择查询结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to stop auto-cleaning the articles intros for better readability.
ast.target: 是否停止自动清理文章导语以提高可读性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to open articles in a fullscreen tab instead of a split view when using the Web viewer plugin or creating an article note.
ast.target: 在使用 Web viewer 插件或创建文章笔记时，是否在全屏标签中打开文章而非拆分视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to override existing files when creating article notes.
ast.target: 在创建文章笔记时是否覆盖现有文件。
